'''鈭歝h-t-dh''' ('''chatadha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yet|yet]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-t-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yet|yet]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歝h-t-dh
|-
! Lemma
| chatadha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:chatadhithi|chatadhithi]] || [[word:chatadhiji|chatadhiji]] || [[word:chatadhishi|chatadhishi]] || [[word:chatadhi|chatadhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:chatadhuthuth|chatadhuthuth]] || [[word:chatadhujuj|chatadhujuj]] || [[word:chatadhushush|chatadhushush]] || [[word:chatadh|chatadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:chatadhuthu|chatadhuthu]] || [[word:chatadhuju|chatadhuju]] || [[word:chatadhushu|chatadhushu]] || [[word:chatadhu|chatadhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:chatadhufuth|chatadhufuth]] || [[word:chatadhufuj|chatadhufuj]] || [[word:chatadhufush|chatadhufush]] || [[word:chatadhuf|chatadhuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:chatadhethe|chatadhethe]] || [[word:chatadheje|chatadheje]] || [[word:chatadheshe|chatadheshe]] || [[word:chatadhe|chatadhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:chatadhothoth|chatadhothoth]] || [[word:chatadhojoj|chatadhojoj]] || [[word:chatadhoshosh|chatadhoshosh]] || [[word:chatadh|chatadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:chatadhotho|chatadhotho]] || [[word:chatadhojo|chatadhojo]] || [[word:chatadhosho|chatadhosho]] || [[word:chatadho|chatadho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:chatadhofoth|chatadhofoth]] || [[word:chatadhofoj|chatadhofoj]] || [[word:chatadhofosh|chatadhofosh]] || [[word:chatadhof|chatadhof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:chatadh忙th忙|chatadh忙th忙]] || [[word:chatadh忙j忙|chatadh忙j忙]] || [[word:chatadh忙sh忙|chatadh忙sh忙]] || [[word:chatadh忙|chatadh忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:chatadhathath|chatadhathath]] || [[word:chatadhajaj|chatadhajaj]] || [[word:chatadhashash|chatadhashash]] || [[word:chatadh|chatadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:chatadhatha|chatadhatha]] || [[word:chatadhaja|chatadhaja]] || [[word:chatadhasha|chatadhasha]] || [[word:chatadha|chatadha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:chatadhafath|chatadhafath]] || [[word:chatadhafaj|chatadhafaj]] || [[word:chatadhafash|chatadhafash]] || [[word:chatadhaf|chatadhaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:chatadhasha|chatadhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gochatadhasha|gochatadhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokichatadhasha|gokichatadhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:chatadhn眉sha|chatadhn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gochatadhnkn眉sha|gochatadhnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokichatadhn眉sha|gokichatadhn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:chatadhsh毛sha|chatadhsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochatadhnksh毛sha|gochatadhnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokichatadhsh毛sha|gokichatadhsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chatadhrosha|chatadhrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochatadhnkrosha|gochatadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokichatadhrosha|gokichatadhrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chatadhmusha|chatadhmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gochatadhnkmusha|gochatadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichatadhmusha|gokichatadhmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:chatadhsherasha|chatadhsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gochatadhnksherasha|gochatadhnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokichatadhsherasha|gokichatadhsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:chatadhngasha|chatadhngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gochatadhnkngasha|gochatadhnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokichatadhngasha|gokichatadhngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chatadhyasha|chatadhyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gochatadhnkyasha|gochatadhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokichatadhyasha|gokichatadhyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:chatadhyamasha|chatadhyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gochatadhnkyamasha|gochatadhnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokichatadhyamasha|gokichatadhyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:chatadhn眉sh毛sha|chatadhn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gochatadhnkn眉sh毛sha|gochatadhnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokichatadhn眉sh毛sha|gokichatadhn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:chatadhn眉rosha|chatadhn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochatadhnkn眉rosha|gochatadhnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokichatadhn眉rosha|gokichatadhn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chatadhn眉musha|chatadhn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochatadhnkn眉musha|gochatadhnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichatadhn眉musha|gokichatadhn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:chatadhsh毛n眉sha|chatadhsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gochatadhnksh毛n眉sha|gochatadhnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokichatadhsh毛n眉sha|gokichatadhsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:chatadhsh毛rosha|chatadhsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochatadhnksh毛rosha|gochatadhnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokichatadhsh毛rosha|gokichatadhsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chatadhsh毛musha|chatadhsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochatadhnksh毛musha|gochatadhnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichatadhsh毛musha|gokichatadhsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:chatadhron眉sha|chatadhron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gochatadhnkron眉sha|gochatadhnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokichatadhron眉sha|gokichatadhron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:chatadhrosh毛sha|chatadhrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gochatadhnkrosh毛sha|gochatadhnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokichatadhrosh毛sha|gokichatadhrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chatadhromusha|chatadhromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochatadhnkromusha|gochatadhnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichatadhromusha|gokichatadhromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:chatadhmun眉sha|chatadhmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gochatadhnkmun眉sha|gochatadhnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokichatadhmun眉sha|gokichatadhmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:chatadhmush毛sha|chatadhmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gochatadhnkmush毛sha|gochatadhnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokichatadhmush毛sha|gokichatadhmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:chatadhmurosha|chatadhmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochatadhnkmurosha|gochatadhnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokichatadhmurosha|gokichatadhmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:chatadh|chatadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ch忙t忙dh|ch忙t忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hochatadh|hochatadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hoch忙t忙dh|hoch忙t忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohochatadh|hohochatadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoch忙t忙dh|hohoch忙t忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉chatadh|n眉chatadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉ch忙t忙dh|n眉ch忙t忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉chatadh|n眉n眉chatadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉ch忙t忙dh|n眉n眉ch忙t忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂chatadh|n茂chatadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂ch忙t忙dh|n茂ch忙t忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂chatadh|n茂n茂chatadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂ch忙t忙dh|n茂n茂ch忙t忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luchatadh|luchatadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luch忙t忙dh|luch忙t忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluchatadh|luluchatadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluch忙t忙dh|luluch忙t忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lichatadh|lichatadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lich忙t忙dh|lich忙t忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilichatadh|lilichatadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilich忙t忙dh|lilich忙t忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kochatadh|kochatadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:koch忙t忙dh|koch忙t忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokochatadh|kokochatadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoch忙t忙dh|kokoch忙t忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kechatadh|kechatadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kech忙t忙dh|kech忙t忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekechatadh|kekechatadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekech忙t忙dh|kekech忙t忙dh]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
